compacted.description: Context-compaction envelope emitted by newer Codex sessions.
compacted.future_use: Could preserve compaction boundaries or replacement history in transcripts.

instructions.description: Session bootstrap instructions captured directly in older Codex session metadata.
instructions.future_use: Could backfill hidden bootstrap transcript rendering for older sessions.

payload.instructions:
## Skills
These skills are discovered at startup...

base_instructions.description: Structured base instructions embedded by newer Codex sessions.
base_instructions.future_use: Could feed richer system-message reconstruction and provider instruction views.

base_instructions.text: You are Codex, a coding agent based on GPT-5.

agent_nickname.description: Nickname assigned to a spawned Codex subagent.
agent_nickname.future_use: Could improve merged subagent dividers and resume displays.

agent_role.description: Role assigned to a spawned Codex subagent.
agent_role.future_use: Could classify subagent transcripts by responsibility in the UI.

forked_from_id.description: Parent thread identifier for forked or subagent Codex sessions.
forked_from_id.future_use: Could strengthen parent-child linking when source metadata is incomplete.

repository_url.description: Repository remote URL captured in Codex git metadata.
repository_url.future_use: Could support repo-aware filters, badges, or external links.

turn_id.description: Identifier for the current Codex turn.
turn_id.future_use: Could anchor turn-level metadata, aborts, and per-turn stats.

current_date.description: Date string injected into Codex turn context.
current_date.future_use: Could explain time-sensitive reasoning or provenance in transcript metadata.

timezone.description: Timezone injected into Codex turn context.
timezone.future_use: Could support deterministic transcript rendering or review of date reasoning.

personality.description: Named assistant personality setting for the turn.
personality.future_use: Could help explain response style changes across sessions.

collaboration_mode.description: Structured collaboration-mode settings active for the turn.
collaboration_mode.future_use: Could reconstruct tool availability and interaction mode in hidden system context.

realtime_active.description: Realtime session flag emitted in turn context.
realtime_active.future_use: Could distinguish offline transcripts from realtime sessions.

effort.description: Reasoning effort setting for the active turn.
effort.future_use: Could explain latency and transcript shape differences across turns.

summary.description: Turn-summary mode stored alongside other context controls.
summary.future_use: Could drive transcript compaction or browsing hints.

user_instructions.description: Expanded user instructions carried in turn context.
user_instructions.future_use: Could help rebuild hidden bootstrap messages from turn context alone.

developer_instructions.description: Top-level developer instructions present in some Codex turn-context revisions.
developer_instructions.future_use: Could preserve historical turn-context variants when reconstructing system context.

truncation_policy.description: Truncation policy metadata included in some turn-context payloads.
truncation_policy.future_use: Could explain compaction behavior and transcript clipping decisions.

ghost_snapshot.description: Snapshot of the worktree state recorded before Codex edits or commands.
ghost_snapshot.future_use: Could support git-state previews and restore-oriented transcript views.

phase.description: Assistant response phase, such as commentary or final answer.
phase.future_use: Could render assistant progress and final-answer boundaries more faithfully.

input_image.description: Image content block included in Codex response-item content arrays.
input_image.future_use: Could enable inline image previews or richer media markers in transcripts.

task_started.description: Marker emitted when Codex starts a new turn.
task_started.future_use: Could support turn lifecycle analytics and abort grouping.

turn_aborted.description: Marker emitted when a turn is interrupted or aborted.
turn_aborted.future_use: Could explain incomplete reasoning or cancelled tool runs in transcripts.

context_compacted.description: Event emitted when Codex compacts context mid-session.
context_compacted.future_use: Could show compaction boundaries in the browser or viewer.

entered_review_mode.description: Event emitted when Codex enters review mode.
entered_review_mode.future_use: Could annotate transcript mode switches or reviewer-specific flows.

exited_review_mode.description: Event emitted when Codex exits review mode.

images.description: Image attachments array included with user_message events.
images.future_use: Could render user-supplied images or attachment counts.

local_images.description: Local image references included with user_message events.
local_images.future_use: Could link local image assets shown to Codex during a turn.

text_elements.description: Structured user text elements included alongside the plain message field.
text_elements.future_use: Could preserve richer prompt segmentation in transcripts.

memory_citation.description: Optional memory-citation metadata attached to agent_message events.
memory_citation.future_use: Could show when a response relied on stored memory or retrieved context.

thread_id.description: Thread identifier attached to item_completed events.
thread_id.future_use: Could tie completed plans back to their source thread during rebuild.

turn_id.description: Turn identifier attached to item_completed events.
turn_id.future_use: Could associate plans and artifacts with specific turns.

turn_id.description: Turn identifier included on task_complete events.
turn_id.future_use: Could tie final assistant messages back to the completed turn lifecycle.

rate_limits.description: Rate-limit snapshot attached to token_count events.
rate_limits.future_use: Could power quota diagnostics or rate-limit status views.

model_context_window.description: Model context-window size reported with token_count usage info.
model_context_window.future_use: Could explain compaction thresholds and context-depth charts.
